title: knowledge_graph.py is a 658-line god module driving a low maintainability score
evidence: brazilian_soccer_mcp/knowledge_graph.py is 658 lines holding all five query categories; maintainability=0.2882 in scores.json
suggestion: Split match/team/player/competition/statistics queries into separate modules or mixins

title: Lint/quality score below 1.0
suggestion: Run ruff and resolve the reported style/complexity warnings

title: Line coverage at 89%, not full
evidence: test_coverage=0.89 in scores.json — build+tests passed but ~11% of lines uncovered
suggestion: Add tests for the uncovered branches (e.g. formatting.py output paths)

title: Server exposes 14 MCP tools, well beyond the spec's required queries
evidence: brazilian_soccer_mcp/server.py:49-298 registers find_matches, head_to_head, team_record, team_competitions, search_players, get_player, players_by_club, standings, champion, list_competitions, list_seasons, match_statistics, biggest_wins, best_record

title: Overlapping CSV sources de-duplicated via per-competition source priority
evidence: brazilian_soccer_mcp/knowledge_graph.py:99-134 _select_authoritative picks one authoritative source per (competition, season)
